documents.text: Topic: categories. Content: {"fertilizer": {"products": [{"name": "Balanced NPK Blend", "example_npk": "15-15-15", "use_for": ["mid_vigor"]}, {"name": "Nitrogen-Forward NPK", "example_npk": "20-10-10", "use_for": ["early_vigor"]}, {"name": "Phosphorus-Forward NPK", "example_npk": "12-24-12", "use_for": ["high_vigor"]}]}, "soil_amendment": {"products": [{"name": "Agricultural Lime", "use_for": ["acidic_soil"]}, {"name": "Gypsum", "use_for": ["calcium_support"]}, {"name": "Compost", "use_for": ["low_organic_matter"]}]}, "pesticide": {"products": [{"name": "Targeted Fungicide", "use_for": ["fungal_pressure"]}, {"name": "Targeted Insecticide", "use_for": ["pest_pressure"]}]}}

Topic: procurement_guidelines. Content: ["Match product label to crop type and growth stage before purchase.", "Confirm active ingredient and registration status in your jurisdiction.", "Buy only quantities that can be applied within recommended windows."]

Topic: issue_to_product_type. Content: [{"issue": "fungal_pressure", "recommended_types": ["Targeted Fungicide", "Compost"], "why": "Manage active disease pressure and improve canopy-zone resilience over time."}, {"issue": "pest_pressure", "recommended_types": ["Targeted Insecticide"], "why": "Use threshold-based targeted control rather than broad calendar spraying."}, {"issue": "acidic_soil", "recommended_types": ["Agricultural Lime"], "why": "Supports pH correction and nutrient availability when soil tests confirm need."}, {"issue": "low_organic_matter", "recommended_types": ["Compost", "Gypsum"], "why": "Improves soil structure and long-term nutrient cycling."}]

Topic: recommendation_examples. Content: [{"user_question": "Leaves have spots after humid weather. What should I get?", "recommended_flow": ["Confirm symptom pattern and disease risk conditions first.", "Recommend targeted fungicide options available in nearby stores.", "Add one preventive cultural step: airflow, sanitation, irrigation timing."]}, {"user_question": "Field is weak and yellow. Which product helps?", "recommended_flow": ["Check likely nutrient stress and soil moisture context.", "Suggest staged nutrient correction product class, not single guaranteed cure.", "Advise follow-up observation window and local agronomist verification."]}]

Topic: crops. Content: [{"name": "Maize", "ndvi_min": 0.45, "ndvi_max": 0.85, "lai_min": 2.0, "lai_max": 5.5, "rainfall_min_mm": 450, "rainfall_max_mm": 900, "temp_min_c": 18, "temp_max_c": 32, "notes": "Strong option for moderate to high vigor areas with warm temperatures."}, {"name": "Soybean", "ndvi_min": 0.4, "ndvi_max": 0.8, "lai_min": 1.8, "lai_max": 5.0, "rainfall_min_mm": 400, "rainfall_max_mm": 850, "temp_min_c": 16, "temp_max_c": 30, "notes": "Good rotational option where canopy vigor is moderate and drainage is acceptable."}, {"name": "Sorghum", "ndvi_min": 0.3, "ndvi_max": 0.75, "lai_min": 1.2, "lai_max": 4.2, "rainfall_min_mm": 300, "rainfall_max_mm": 700, "temp_min_c": 20, "tem

"ndvi_max": 0.75, "lai_min": 1.2, "lai_max": 4.2, "rainfall_min_mm": 300, "rainfall_max_mm": 700, "temp_min_c": 20, "temp_max_c": 35, "notes": "Resilient under lower rainfall and variable heat profiles."}, {"name": "Cassava", "ndvi_min": 0.32, "ndvi_max": 0.78, "lai_min": 1.4, "lai_max": 4.8, "rainfall_min_mm": 500, "rainfall_max_mm": 1200, "temp_min_c": 20, "temp_max_c": 34, "notes": "Suitable for warm climates with moderate soil variability."}, {"name": "Tomato", "ndvi_min": 0.42, "ndvi_max": 0.84, "lai_min": 1.6, "lai_max": 4.8, "rainfall_min_mm": 350, "rainfall_max_mm": 750, "temp_min_c": 18, "temp_max_c": 31, "notes": "High-value option with strong management requirements for disease an

750, "temp_min_c": 18, "temp_max_c": 31, "notes": "High-value option with strong management requirements for disease and irrigation consistency."}, {"name": "Pepper", "ndvi_min": 0.4, "ndvi_max": 0.82, "lai_min": 1.5, "lai_max": 4.5, "rainfall_min_mm": 320, "rainfall_max_mm": 700, "temp_min_c": 19, "temp_max_c": 32, "notes": "Suitable for warm conditions with good drainage and close pest monitoring."}]

Topic: crop_selection_rules. Content: [{"condition": "low_rainfall_outlook", "prefer": ["Sorghum", "Cassava"], "reason": "Better resilience under water-limited conditions."}, {"condition": "high_humidity_and_disease_risk", "prefer": ["Maize", "Soybean"], "reason": "Lower management intensity than sensitive vegetable crops under persistent humidity."}, {"condition": "good_irrigation_control_and_market_access", "prefer": ["Tomato", "Pepper"], "reason": "Higher margin potential with stronger management and scouting discipline."}]

Topic: stage_sensitive_notes. Content: [{"crop": "Maize", "critical_stages": ["tasseling", "grain_fill"], "advice": "Avoid moisture and nutrient stress during reproductive windows."}, {"crop": "Soybean", "critical_stages": ["flowering", "pod_set"], "advice": "Protect moisture and monitor pod-feeding pests closely."}, {"crop": "Tomato", "critical_stages": ["flowering", "fruit_set"], "advice": "Maintain regular irrigation and disease scouting for blight pressure."}]
Topic: default_recommendation. Content: {"name": "Maize", "notes": "Default recommendation when precision metrics are incomplete."}
Topic: notes. Content: "Agronomy playbook for practical, field-level decision support. Use with local labels and extension guidance."

Topic: synonyms. Content: {"nitrogen_deficiency": ["yellow leaves", "pale leaves", "slow growth", "weak canopy"], "water_stress": ["wilting", "rolled leaves", "leaf curl", "dry topsoil"], "fungal_pressure": ["leaf spots", "blight", "mildew", "mold"], "pest_pressure": ["holes in leaves", "chewed leaves", "insect damage", "aphids", "armyworm"]}

Topic: crop_stage_guidance. Content: [{"crop": "maize", "stage": "emergence_to_v3", "signals": ["stand establishment", "even emergence", "starter vigor"], "actions": ["Maintain weed-free rows during first 3 to 4 weeks.", "Avoid waterlogging in seedling stage; improve drainage if needed.", "If chlorosis appears early, confirm nitrogen and sulfur availability with a quick soil check."], "cautions": ["Do not over-apply nitrogen in one shot on sandy soils.", "Avoid herbicide stress under heat and moisture deficit."]}, {"crop": "maize", "stage": "v6_to_tasseling", "signals": ["rapid canopy growth", "high nitrogen demand", "water sensitivity"], "actions": ["Split nitrogen application across growth

apid canopy growth", "high nitrogen demand", "water sensitivity"], "actions": ["Split nitrogen application across growth windows where rainfall risk is high.", "Prioritize irrigation consistency to reduce stress before tasseling.", "Scout for foliar disease weekly in humid conditions."], "cautions": ["Water stress near tasseling can cause major yield loss.", "Unbalanced nitrogen and potassium can increase lodging risk."]}, {"crop": "rice", "stage": "tillering_to_panicle", "signals": ["tiller count", "uniform stand", "leaf color"], "actions": ["Keep water depth stable based on local rice management practice.", "Use split nutrient timing to match tillering and panicle initiation.", "Monitor fo

on local rice management practice.", "Use split nutrient timing to match tillering and panicle initiation.", "Monitor for blast risk when humidity is persistently high."], "cautions": ["Excess nitrogen late can increase disease pressure and lodging.", "Poor drainage around field edges can drive patchy stress."]}, {"crop": "soybean", "stage": "flowering_to_pod_fill", "signals": ["flower retention", "pod set", "canopy temperature"], "actions": ["Protect moisture during flowering and pod set windows.", "Prioritize pest scouting for pod feeders and defoliators.", "Keep field records of stress windows for next-season adjustments."], "cautions": ["Short drought during pod set can reduce final yiel
cords of stress windows for next-season adjustments."], "cautions": ["Short drought during pod set can reduce final yield strongly.", "Avoid unnecessary sprays without threshold-based scouting."]}]

Topic: symptom_to_likely_causes. Content: [{"symptom": "older leaves turning yellow first", "likely_causes": ["nitrogen deficiency", "root restriction", "waterlogging history"], "checks": ["review recent rainfall", "inspect root health", "confirm soil nitrogen status"], "first_actions": ["apply staged nitrogen where appropriate", "improve drainage", "reassess in 5 to 7 days"]}, {"symptom": "leaf spots expanding during humid weather", "likely_causes": ["fungal disease pressure"], "checks": ["check lower canopy first", "inspect lesion pattern", "review humidity and wet-leaf duration"], "first_actions": ["remove heavily infected debris where practical", "improve airflow", "consider registered f

uration"], "first_actions": ["remove heavily infected debris where practical", "improve airflow", "consider registered fungicide per label and threshold"]}, {"symptom": "wilting at midday with recovery at evening", "likely_causes": ["early water stress", "shallow roots", "compacted top layer"], "checks": ["soil moisture at 10 to 20 cm", "root depth", "compaction signs"], "first_actions": ["adjust irrigation timing", "reduce surface evaporation with residue or mulch", "break compaction in next prep cycle"]}, {"symptom": "irregular patches of poor growth", "likely_causes": ["drainage variability", "soil pH variability", "localized pest pressure"], "checks": ["map low spots", "run targeted pH c

drainage variability", "soil pH variability", "localized pest pressure"], "checks": ["map low spots", "run targeted pH checks", "inspect roots and stems in affected zones"], "first_actions": ["zone-based correction instead of whole-field uniform treatment", "track affected coordinates"]}]

Topic: irrigation_rules_of_thumb. Content: [{"condition": "hot_and_windy", "signals": ["temperature above 32C", "high evapotranspiration", "leaf rolling"], "guidance": "Use shorter, more frequent irrigation cycles to reduce stress spikes."}, {"condition": "recent_heavy_rain", "signals": ["field saturation", "standing water", "low oxygen risk"], "guidance": "Delay additional irrigation and prioritize drainage checks before the next watering decision."}, {"condition": "flowering_or_reproductive_stage", "signals": ["flowering", "pod set", "tasseling", "grain fill"], "guidance": "Avoid moisture gaps in reproductive windows; these stages are highly yield-sensitive."}]

Topic: question_patterns. Content: [{"user_phrases": ["what should i do today", "my crop is yellowing", "why are leaves curling", "is this blight"], "recommendation_style": "Start with a decision, state evidence, then provide a 3-step action plan and one safety caution."}]

Topic: safety_and_compliance. Content: ["Always follow product labels and local registration rules.", "Use threshold-based pest and disease decisions where possible.", "Do not mix products unless label compatibility is confirmed.", "Escalate to local agronomist or extension service for severe or fast-spreading symptoms."]
